reviews.review_description: I’m so happy it’s back I’m going to make a video and hopefully it will be revived with active players playing the game 10/10 game the horror is scary and fun
I tried and tried but there's a invisible barrier at the hole you go into at spawn.
It was good I used to play it every day but it got discounted, if any devs are reading this pls give me a discord link

Hey there! Developer's if you are reading this I just wanted to say that I would be able to be a moderator to help out this game, not trying to beg or anything like that but please reply to this with a decision thank you so much! (NOT BEGGING FOR MODS!)  



Can I have the discord link?
The vent is VARY LONG. You need to make it shorter. Of new people join they will be bored going through a long vent.pls make it shorter or I will not play it. Pls next update make it shorter.

developer_response.body: If you hate it then don't play, thank you. Giving 1 star make no sense to us and it hurts our game.
